title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-18
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot has a clipboard or is scanning plants (apps) with its screen, representing the automated health checks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse.
